issues.description: Effect is missing the cost condition. Card text states 'You may rest 2 of your Characters' which is a cost/condition that must be satisfied before DrawCard action. DSL should include a condition checking for ability to rest 2 Characters, or this should be modeled as an Activated ability with a Rest cost, not a simple OnPlay trigger.
Trigger should be 'Activated' (optional/manual ability introduced by 'You may') rather than 'OnPlay'. This is a player-activated effect, not automatic on play.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] You may rest 2 of your Characters: Draw 2 cards.
